title: Hydra Dissociation and Reaggregation Protocol
author: Yashodara Abeykoon
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.6tyhepw

steps.title: Wash 30 Hydra several times in...
steps.instruction: Wash 30 Hydra several times in fresh Hydra Medium (HM) to remove debris

steps.title: Transfer Hydra to 1
steps.instruction: Transfer Hydra to 1.5mL Eppendorf, remove media, and add 1mL 4°C Dissociation Medium (DM)

steps.title: Incubate Hydra at 4°C for 30-60...
steps.instruction: Incubate Hydra at 4°C for 30-60 min (can incubate several hours without obvious detriment/benefit)

steps.title: Shear by glass Pasteur pipette ~10-15x...
steps.instruction: Shear by glass Pasteur pipette ~10-15x until supernatant becomes slightly turbid, allow Hydra to settle, and discard supernatant [ST1- refer to guidelines]

steps.title: Add 1mL fresh 4°C DM and...
steps.instruction: Add 1mL fresh 4°C DM and shear by pipetting up and down with glass pasteur pipette ~1-1.5 min until solution becomes turbid, and approximately half of the available tissue is dissociated [ST2 - refer to guidelines]

steps.title: Let remaining large pieces settle
steps.instruction: Let remaining large pieces settle. The supernatant contains the cells that will be collected and used for reaggregation

steps.title: Aliquot supernatant (dissociated cell suspension from...
steps.instruction: Aliquot supernatant (dissociated cell suspension from step 7) to new Eppendorf tubes at an approximate desired cell density [ST3 -refer to guidelines]

steps.title: Centrifuge aliquots in microcentrifuge at 800g...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge aliquots in microcentrifuge at 800g for 6 min [ST4 -refer to guidelines]

steps.title: Invert tubes for ~5-10 min to...
steps.instruction: Invert tubes for ~5-10 min to allow pellet to passively separate from the tube wall [ST5 -refer to guidelines]

steps.title: Transfer pellet to a 24-well plate...
steps.instruction: Transfer pellet to a 24-well plate containing a 50/50 mixture of DM and HM+Penicillin/Streptomycin (P/S) or 100% DM [ST6 -refer to guidelines]

steps.title: Periodically during development, replace the medium with HM+P/S
steps.instruction: Periodically during development, replace the medium with HM+P/S

steps.title: If starting from 50/50 DM/HM+P/S, depending...
steps.instruction: If starting from 50/50 DM/HM+P/S, depending on the duration of the experiment, make the first medium exchange by 12hpa or 24hpa, and make subsequent exchanges at ~24h intervals for the duration of the experiment.

steps.title: If starting with 100% DM, exchange...
steps.instruction: If starting with 100% DM, exchange into 50/50 DM/HM+P/S at ~4 hours post aggregation (hpa), exhange into HM+P/S 100% at ~16hpa, and then continue to exange medium every ~24 hours [ST7 - refer to guidelines]
